title: Library of Congress: Civil War Primary Sources
description: A LOC source card for Civil War documents, photographs, maps, and classroom materials.
license: Library of Congress / item-level rights vary

pages.text: Library of Congress Civil War materials include photographs, maps, letters, songs, newspapers, and other sources about conflict, emancipation, and home-front life.
Use this source for document analysis, comparing viewpoints, building historical context, and connecting visual evidence with written evidence.
Library of Congress collections mix public-domain, rights-unknown, and restricted items. Check item-level rights before downloading or adapting specific sources.
